wikitext:
{{Sequel Disambiguation}} {{Power Infobox|Poison|2}}
{{BD|Poison||2}} is a {{2|Debuffs|Debuff}} that the {{KW|Silent||2}} can apply to Enemies.

At the beginning of its turn, an enemy with {{BD|Poison||2}} will lose HP equal to its number of {{BD|Poison||2}} stacks. Then, its {{BD|Poison||2}} stack will decrease by 1.

{{BD|Poison||2}} inflicts HP loss after the enemy's {{KW|Block||2}} is removed, and each {{BD|Artifact||2}} stack will negate all {{BD|Poison||2}} applied by a single source. 

== Sources ==

==== Cards ====
* {{C|Deadly Poison||2}}: 5(7) {{BD|Poison||2}}.
* {{C|Poisoned Stab||2}}: 3(4) {{BD|Poison||2}}.
* {{C|Snakebite||2}}: 7(10) {{BD|Poison||2}}.
* {{C|Bouncing Flask||2}}: 3 {{BD|Poison||2}} to a random enemy 3(4) times.
* {{C|Bubble Bubble||2}}: If the enemy has {{BD|Poison||2}}, apply 9(12) {{BD|Poison||2}}.
* {{C|Haze||2}}: {{KW|Sly||2}}. 3(4) {{BD|Poison||2}} to ALL enemies.
* {{C|Noxious Fumes||2}}: 2(3) {{BD|Poison||2}} each turn to all enemies.
* {{C|Corrosive Wave||2}}: Whenever you draw a card this turn, apply 2(3) {{BD|Poison||2}} to ALL enemies.
* {{C|Envenom||2}}: 1(2) {{BD|Poison||2}} each unblocked attack.

==== Relics ====
* {{R|Snecko Skull||2}}: +1 {{BD|Poison||2}} whenever {{BD|Poison||2}} is applied. 
* {{R|Twisted Funnel||2}}: 4 {{BD|Poison||2}} to all enemies at the start of combat.

==== Potions ====
*{{P|Poison Potion||2}}: 6 {{BD|Poison||2}}.

== Interactions ==
=== Synergies ===
* {{C|Bubble Bubble||2}} will only have an effect when the target is {{BD|Poison|Poisoned|2}}.
* {{C|Mirage||2}}:  Gain {{KW|Block||2}} equal to {{BD|Poison||2}} on ALL enemies.
* {{C|Outbreak||2}}: Every 3 times you apply {{BD|Poison||2}}, deal 11(15) damage to ALL enemies.
* {{C|Accelerant||2}}: Poison is triggered 1(2) additional time(s).
* ''[[Slay the Spire 2:Debuffs|Debuff]]'' Synergies
** {{C|Sleight of Flesh||2}}: Inflicts 9(13) damage to an enemy whenever they receive a debuff from {{C|Sleight of Flesh||2}}'s controller.
** {{C|Misery||2}}: Apply any debuffs on the enemy to ALL other enemies.
** {{C|Rend||2}}: Deals 5(8) additional damage for each unique debuff on an enemy.
** {{R|Unsettling Lamp||2}} doubles the first application of a [[Slay the Spire 2:Debuffs|Debuff]] via a played card during combat.
===Other===
{{KW|Intangible||2}} reduces ''all'' sources of HP loss to 1, including {{BD|Poison||2}}.

As {{BD|Poison||2}} applies at the start of the enemy's turn, it has some unusual interactions:
* {{BD|Poison||2}} damage causes {{M|Lagavulin Matriarch||2}} to wake up, consuming its Stunned effect in the process.
* If the enemy dies to {{BD|Poison||2}}, the card drawn by {{R|Gremlin Horn||2}} will be held until your next turn.
* If an enemy with {{BD|Minion|Minions|2}} dies this way, its Minions will still flee combat before attacking.
